message:
fix(ci): Make numpy and pydantic-core builds non-fatal (tests must always run)

A build failure in numpy or pydantic-core was killing the entire CI
pipeline — all subsequent steps including tests were skipped. Tests
must always run regardless of optional extension build status. The
variant builder already handles missing objects gracefully (falls back
to pydantic-core only or base python.wasm).

files.patch:
@@ -91,6 +91,7 @@ jobs:
           key: numpy-wasm-${{ hashFiles('scripts/build-numpy-wasm.sh', 'recipes/numpy.json') }}
 
       - name: Build numpy WASM objects
+        continue-on-error: true
         run: |
           if [ ! -d build/zig-wasi/Modules/numpy ] || [ "$(ls build/zig-wasi/Modules/numpy/*.o 2>/dev/null | wc -l)" -eq 0 ]; then
             bash scripts/build-numpy-wasm.sh
@@ -103,6 +104,7 @@ jobs:
           key: pydantic-core-wasm-${{ hashFiles('scripts/build-pydantic-core-wasm.sh', 'recipes/pydantic-core.json') }}
 
       - name: Build pydantic-core WASM objects
+        continue-on-error: true
         run: |
           if [ ! -d build/recipes/pydantic-core/obj ] || [ "$(ls build/recipes/pydantic-core/obj/*.o build/recipes/pydantic-core/obj/*.a 2>/dev/null | wc -l)" -eq 0 ]; then
             bash scripts/build-pydantic-core-wasm.sh
